title: kopsia nana
intro: Kopsia nana, also known as the Kopsia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Borneo. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and roots contain bioactive compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Kopsia nana is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some regions, it's also used to make a medicinal oil or tincture.
